LanguageData.OGBL_NoCorePowerNet: The grav core must be connected to a power net.
LanguageData.OGBL_GravCoreNotPowered: The grav core must be powered.
LanguageData.OGBL_PilotConsoleNotPowered: The active pilot console must be powered on the grav core's power net.
LanguageData.OGBL_ThrustersNotPowered: All connected thrusters must be powered on the grav core's power net: {0}/{1} ready.
LanguageData.OGBL_NotEnoughStoredPower: Not enough stored battery energy on the grav core's power net for takeoff: {0} / {1} available. Required footprint: {2} tiles × 100.
LanguageData.OGBL_PrepareForLaunchDesc: Start charging the grav engine. This takes 2 in-game hours and consumes heavy continuous power from the grav core's power net. If power fails, the preparation is canceled and the invested energy is lost.
LanguageData.OGBL_PrepareForLaunchWarning: Preparing this gravship for launch will broadcast a clear threat signal. Any present raiders will attack immediately, and any dormant mech cluster on the map will wake up and attack. Continue?
LanguageData.OGBL_AbortPreparationDesc: Shut the grav engine down and discard all current spool-up progress.
LanguageData.OGBL_ShutdownPreparedEngineDesc: Discharge the prepared grav engine and return it to the idle state.
LanguageData.OGBL_PreparationStarted: Gravship engine preparation started. Estimated duration: {0}.
LanguageData.OGBL_PreparationAlreadyInProgress: This grav engine is already preparing for launch.
LanguageData.OGBL_AlreadyPrepared: This grav engine is already fully prepared for launch.
LanguageData.OGBL_PreparationComplete: Gravship engine fully prepared. Standard launch is now available.
LanguageData.OGBL_EnginePreparingInspect: Spool-up charge: {0}% complete. Extra draw: {1} W.
LanguageData.OGBL_EnginePreparedInspect: Engine prepared. Maintaining spool-up charge. Extra draw: {0} W.
LanguageData.OGBL_EngineNotPrepared: The grav engine is not prepared. Use Prepare for launch first.
LanguageData.OGBL_EngineSpooling: The grav engine is still spooling up: {0}% complete.
LanguageData.OGBL_PreparationCanceledAfterLoad: Pending gravship engine preparations were canceled after loading the save.
LanguageData.OGBL_PreparationCanceledCorePower: Gravship engine preparation canceled: the grav core lost power and the invested energy was lost.
LanguageData.OGBL_PreparationCanceledConsolePower: Gravship engine preparation canceled: the pilot console lost power and the invested energy was lost.
